videoSnippet.title: Even Engines Fear This Man || Veselin Topalov vs Vasyl Ivanchuk || Linares (1999)
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Lotus Chess April Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/nT0JRnZV
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Veselin Topalov vs Vasyl Ivanchuk
"Over the Top" (game of the day Jul-14-2016)
Linares (1999), Linares ESP, rd 13, Mar-09
Zukertort Opening: Sicilian Invitation (A04)

1. Nf3 c5 2. c4 Nc6 3. d4 cd4 4. Nd4 e6 5. g3 Bb4 6. Nc3 Qa5 7. Ndb5 d5 8. a3 Bc3 9. bc3 Nf6 10. Bg2 O-O 11. Qb3 dc4 12. Qc4 e5 13. Nd6 Be6 14. Qd3 e4 15. Ne4 Ne4 16. Be4 Rad8 17. Qc2 Nd4 18. Qb2 Ne2 19. Ke2 Rfe8 20. Qb4 Qh5 21. f3 f5 22. g4 Qh3 23. gf5 Bf5 24. Qc4 Kh8 25. Re1 Re4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
03:30 Lotus Endgames are here!
04:10 Game Starts!
07:15 Pause the Video!
13:30 It WaS IN this Position!
16:20 Legends of the Channel!
